title: Jump anywhere in 2 keys
body: Press ⌘K to open the command palette and fuzzy-search across pages, projects, and actions.

title: See every shortcut
body: Press ? from anywhere to open the full keyboard shortcuts tour.

title: Navigate without the mouse
body: Press g then h to go home, g then i for inbox, g then a for agents. It's faster than clicking.

title: Vim-style list navigation
body: On most lists, press j to move down and k to move up. Hit enter to open the highlighted item.

title: Talk to your CoCo
body: Press ⌘J or click the orb to launch Jarvis voice mode and dictate decisions hands-free.

title: Quick create
body: Press c on any page to create something new — a todo, project, or draft, depending on context.

title: Reclaim screen space
body: Press ⌘B to collapse the sidebar. Your projects stay one keystroke away when you need them.

title: Decide without context-switching
body: Pending decisions show up in the briefing card on Home. Approve or reject inline without opening a new page.

title: Listen to your day
body: The morning podcast summarises overnight Knowledge Hub activity in 90 seconds. Tap play on Home.

title: Your second brain
body: Everything CoCo knows about people, projects, and decisions lives at /brain. Search it any time with ⌘K.
